name: open-source-doc-toolkit
description: 14 Claude Code skills that write every document your open-source project needs — README to GOVERNANCE, professionally and consistently. 开源文档全家桶。

plugins.name: readme-writer
plugins.description: Write professional README.md — platform-agnostic project landing page

plugins.name: github-upload
plugins.description: Standardized git init → .gitignore → README → push workflow

plugins.name: contributing-writer
plugins.description: Write CONTRIBUTING.md + PR templates following OSS best practices

plugins.name: template-writer
plugins.description: Write GitHub issue/PR YAML form templates with required field validation

plugins.name: architecture-writer
plugins.description: Write ARCHITECTURE.md following arc42 and C4 model best practices

plugins.name: release-writer
plugins.description: Write CHANGELOG.md + release notes following SemVer and Keep a Changelog

plugins.name: roadmap-writer
plugins.description: Write honest ROADMAP.md with confidence levels

plugins.name: security-policy-writer
plugins.description: Write SECURITY.md with vulnerability reporting and disclosure policy

plugins.name: support-writer
plugins.description: Write SUPPORT.md directing users to help channels

plugins.name: governance-writer
plugins.description: Write GOVERNANCE.md based on Minimum Viable Governance

plugins.name: opensource-publish
plugins.description: Publish to Weblate, Open Collective, Codecov, ReadTheDocs and more
